arts.ttl: Spurs 'need to reinforce' in January - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham are "short in a couple of areas" and "need to reinforce" during the January transfer window, says Ange Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Tottenham TV channel, live stream details, highlights and kick-off time
arts.sum: Tottenham head to Nottingham Forest on Boxing Day in search of a much-needed win after another disappointing defeat in the Premier League. Despite conceding SIX times against Liverpool, Ange Postecoglou's side were once again bright going forward and have now scored the most goals in the Premier League this season with 39 from 17 matches.

arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti was a huge admirer of the Spurs-linked defender 🤯

arts.ttl: Palace star has been offered to Tottenham for transfer
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou appears to have been on the end of some criticism of late, with Tottenham’s 6-3 defeat at the hands of Liverpool doing the Australian no favours whatsoever. With the January transfer window just around the corner, the chance of bringing new faces in to help propel Tottenham up the Premier League is likely […] The post Palace star has been offered to Tottenham for transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle and Tottenham to battle European giants for €35m-rated talent wanted by nine other clubs
arts.sum: Decent centre-backs don’t come up for sale very often, so it’s no surprise to see up to 11 clubs wanted to do battle for PSG’s brilliant Slovak defender, Milan Skriniar. According to CaughtOffside sources with knowledge of Paris Saint-Germain‘s transfer plans, Milan Skriniar is set to be made available in the January transfer window for […] The post Newcastle and Tottenham to battle European giants for €35m-rated talent wanted by nine other clubs appeared first on CaughtOffside.
